category_sources: source_facts.description says build and distribute your code; official docs describe jsrepo as a toolchain for distributing code and registries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies jsrepo; official GitHub README title is jsrepo.
docs_sources: Official jsrepo.dev docs are linked from the project homepage and repository.
repo_sources: Official jsrepo.com links to GitHub organization jsrepojs; pinned repository jsrepojs/jsrepo is described as the modern registry toolchain.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official jsrepo.dev docs describe registries, CLI, providers, and distributing code.
